stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
(For this question use CAP 698 figure 3.1). Calculate the de-factored distance for TODA that could be used to enter the take-off performance graph for a multi-engined piston aeroplane used for Commercial Air Transport, given the following information:

Take-Off Distance Available: 4230 ft
Runway slope: 1.25% upslope
Runway surface: paved, wet
Aerodrome field lengths: unbalanced
